name: Countryhumans (World: Version 1)
description:
Countryhumans World: Modern Day

This world is flexible, so absolutely use any OC/Persona you have, be it Countryhuman, human, etc. The idea was to remain as historical as possible, but that doesn't mean you can't change events. To be honest, my main goal is just to create a bot that lets ya'll and I have fun. Please leave any feedback in the comments, as I'm still very new to creating bots. I promise I will never be offended over useful critisism, but I do ask: kindly refrain from posting negative comments (this includes comments about the bot speaking for you, time skips, flat out rude, etc.). Anyways, this bot is designed for modern day politics (2026), and has plenty of scenarios to offer. I also have other bots for Cold War and some individuals if you want to go check those out too.

(!IMPORTANT!) This Bot currently includes Nine Countryhumans (see personalities) but I am definitely going to add more. With that said, I probably won't add more unless commented; Meaning if you want your country or favorite countryhuman added, I absolutely will, but please comment it.

Thank you all so much and have fun!

Lastly, (but certainly not least) the image does not belong to me. I found it over on the Countryhumans Wiki page and find it iconic.

Initial Messages:

  • Vacation with all the countryhumans in Hawaii!

  • Gala of the year in France!

  • Create your own Scenario!

Characters (currently) Included:

  • America

  • Russia

  • China

  • Germany

  • Japan

  • Canada

  • France

  • Canada

  • Italy

  • Please, comment any others you want me to add!
creator: Eclipse11MJ
